span.p:
定理 5.2 AI Function Non-Determinism
AI 功能复用受概率性制约

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
M.1 Architecture-Reuse Duality
复用即约束传递

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
E.2 Cost-Benefit Threshold
成本-收益阈值

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
E.3 Contextual Fitness
上下文适配性

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P1
AI 功能契约必须包含确定性边界

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 例如 P(正确性) ≥ 0.95 或置信区间

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P2
温度参数与模型版本是复用约束

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 相同 Prompt 在不同温度下输出分布不同

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
结论 P3
确定性计算不应委托给 LLM

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 概率性输出不适合需要精确结果的场景

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P4
MCP Tool 是跨 Agent 复用功能的标准单元

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Schema + Capability Negotiation 显式传递约束

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P5
工作流复用需保证组合语义正确

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: S.2：局部满足规约 + 兼容接口 → 组合满足弱化规约

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P6
功能复用 ROI 要求 AAF < 0.7

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: COCOMO II 改编调整因子阈值
